name: Chris Redd
bio: Chris Redd is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer who grew up in the Chicago suburbs and trained at The Second City. He joined the cast of Saturday Night Live in 2017 and won an Emmy for co-writing the song Come Back Barack. He released his first hour special, Why Am I Like This?, in 2022.

timeline.ev: Film debut in Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping
Joins the cast of Saturday Night Live
Wins Emmy for co-writing Come Back Barack
Debut album But Here We Are released
First hour special, Why Am I Like This?, premieres

accolades: Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Original Music and Lyrics (2018)
Comedy Central Records album But Here We Are (2019)
HBO Max special Why Am I Like This? (2022)
